info.name: SoulBuddy Chat API
info.description:
Postman collection for SoulBuddy backend chat endpoints.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection.
2. Import `SoulBuddy.postman_environment.json` and select it as the active environment.
3. For cognito requests, set `supabase_token` in the environment to a valid Supabase JWT.

request.description: Returns server status and connectivity of all services (data DB, auth DB, Supabase).

response.name: 200 OK — all services healthy
response.body:
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "server": "running",
  "data_database": "connected",
  "auth_database": "connected",
  "supabase": "connected"
}

item.name: Chat — Incognito (anonymous)
item.description: No Authorization header required. `is_incognito` must be `true`. Conversation history is session-scoped — pass the `sb_conv_id` returned in the first response to continue the same conversation.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Start a new anonymous conversation. No `sb_conv_id` needed — one is generated and returned in the response.

response.name: 200 OK — new session
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "Hi! I'm here to help. What's on your mind?",
  "intent": "greeting",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing anonymous conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment to the UUID returned in the previous response.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description:
Streaming version of the incognito chat endpoint. Returns server-sent events (SSE). Each event is a `data:` line containing a JSON chunk. The stream ends with a final `data: [DONE]` event.

Note: Postman renders SSE responses in the response body as each chunk arrives.

response.name: 200 OK — SSE stream

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing anonymous conversation with streaming. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment.

item.name: Chat — Cognito (authenticated)
item.description: Requires a valid Supabase JWT in the `Authorization: Bearer` header. `is_incognito` must be `false`. The `supabase_uid` is always derived from the token — never pass it in the request body.

header.description: Supabase JWT — required for cognito mode

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Start a new authenticated conversation. The server verifies the JWT and derives `supabase_uid` from it automatically.

response.name: 401 — missing token
200 OK — authenticated session
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "Welcome back! How can I help you today?",
  "intent": "greeting",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing authenticated conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Streaming authenticated chat. Returns SSE. Requires a valid Supabase JWT.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing authenticated conversation with streaming.

item.name: Examples
item.description: Ready-to-run requests with realistic payloads and saved example responses covering every endpoint and common scenarios.

response.name: All services healthy
response.body:
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "server": "running",
  "data_database": "connected",
  "auth_database": "connected",
  "supabase": "connected"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I have exams next week and I feel completely overwhelmed. I don't even know where to start.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — new session created

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I have exams next week and I feel completely overwhelmed. I don't even know where to start.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "That sounds really tough. Exam pressure can feel all-consuming. Let's take it one step at a time — what subject feels the most daunting right now?",
  "intent": "VENTING",
  "situation": "EXAM_ANXIETY",
  "severity": "medium",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Mostly maths. I keep blanking on formulas under pressure.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — conversation continued

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Mostly maths. I keep blanking on formulas under pressure.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "Blanking under pressure is very common and it's not a reflection of how much you know. Have you tried writing out formulas by hand a few times — even without looking? It builds muscle memory that tends to survive stress better than pure memorisation.",
  "intent": "SEEKING_ADVICE",
  "situation": "EXAM_ANXIETY",
  "severity": "medium",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I feel like I'm not good enough and everyone else is handling things better than me.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — SSE stream

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I feel like I'm not good enough and everyone else is handling things better than me.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

{
  "message": "I haven't slept properly in two weeks and I'm starting to feel like nothing matters anymore.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — crisis risk detected

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I haven't slept properly in two weeks and I'm starting to feel like nothing matters anymore.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "7cb12d34-8891-4abc-a1b2-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
  "response": "Thank you for trusting me with this. Two weeks without proper sleep and feeling like nothing matters sounds really serious, and I want to make sure you're safe. Are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself?",
  "intent": "VENTING",
  "situation": "BURNOUT",
  "severity": "high",
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "is_crisis_detected": true,
  "domain": "student"
}

response.name: 401 — missing token

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I haven't slept properly in two weeks.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

{
  "message": "No, I don't want to hurt myself. I just feel really exhausted and empty.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "7cb12d34-8891-4abc-a1b2-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — conversation continued

body.raw:
{
  "message": "No, I don't want to hurt myself. I just feel really exhausted and empty.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "7cb12d34-8891-4abc-a1b2-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "7cb12d34-8891-4abc-a1b2-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
  "response": "I'm relieved to hear that. Exhaustion and emptiness after prolonged stress are very real, and they deserve attention. Have you been able to speak to anyone — a counsellor, a GP, or even a close friend — about how you've been feeling?",
  "intent": "VENTING",
  "situation": "BURNOUT",
  "severity": "high",
  "risk_level": "low",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I've been skipping classes because I get panic attacks on the way to campus.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — SSE stream

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I've been skipping classes because I get panic attacks on the way to campus.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "metadata": null
}

item.name: Messages — Get all conversations with messages

response.name: 200 OK — conversations with decrypted messages
401 — missing or invalid token
200 OK — decrypted messages
400 — invalid UUID
401 — missing or invalid token

item.name: Messages
item.description: Endpoints to retrieve conversation messages. All require a valid Supabase JWT. Messages encrypted at rest are transparently decrypted before being returned.

request.description: Retrieve all conversations for the authenticated user, each with its full decrypted message list. Ordered newest-first.

response.name: 200 OK
401 — missing or invalid token

request.description: Retrieve all decrypted messages for a specific conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment to the target UUID.

response.name: 200 OK
400 — invalid conversation_id
401 — missing or invalid token
